pi_items.metadata_value: Use GIMP's eraser tool to remove a small object from an image, creating transparency
pi_items.verified_value: Task setup creates a test image with a red circle object; verifier checks for transparency creation and object removal; export is to PNG format which supports transparency
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_erase_task.sh, verifier.py, and export_erase.sh

pi_items.verified_value: ImageMagick command creates 800x600 base image; Unsplash URL requests 800x600 but returns unmodified 7360x4912 image when downloaded directly
pi_items.source: ImageMagick command in setup_erase_task.sh line 15-20; direct download verification from Unsplash URL

pi_items.metadata_value: Landscape image with removable red circle object
pi_items.verified_value: ImageMagick creates plasma background (lightblue-lightgreen) with 80x80 overlay containing red circle (R>150, G<100, B<100); positioned at southeast with +150+100 offset; circle radius approximately 30 pixels
pi_items.source: ImageMagick convert command in setup_erase_task.sh: 'circle 40,40 40,10' defines circle at (40,40) with radius 30

pi_items.metadata_value: Unsplash photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8 with URL parameters w=800&h=600&q=80
pi_items.verified_value: URL is valid and returns JPEG image; Unsplash photo ID confirmed real; however direct download returns 7360x4912 resolution instead of requested 800x600
pi_items.source: WebFetch tool downloaded image from Unsplash URL; file analysis shows JPEG 7360x4912 pixels

pi_items.metadata_value: At least 100 transparent pixels required for success
At least 85% similarity in non-transparent areas
Requires 4 out of 5 criteria met (80% score)
pi_items.verified_value: verifier.py line 244: passed = score >= 75; where score = int((criteria_met / total_criteria) * 100) with total_criteria = 5; requires criteria_met >= 4 for 80+ score, but pass threshold is >= 75 (3/5)
pi_items.source: Direct code analysis of verifier.py lines 209-244

pi_items.verified_value: export_erase.sh exports to 'object_removed.png'; PNG supports alpha channel for transparency

privileged_info_summary: The object_erase task uses real data from Unsplash (photo ID photo-1441986300917-64674bd600d8) or generates synthetic test images with ImageMagick. The task requires agents to use GIMP's eraser tool to remove a red circle object from an image while creating transparency and preserving surrounding areas. Verification criteria include: at least 100 transparent pixels, object removal detection via red pixel reduction or >2% pixel changes, transparency between 0.5-25%, 85% preservation of surrounding areas, and >1% image modification. The pass threshold is 75% score (at least 3/5 criteria met, not 4/5 as claimed in some documentation). The timeout is 120 seconds with maximum 10 steps.
